case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MIGUEL ANGEL ALARCON LUNA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON LUNA, MIGUEL ANGEL

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED: DECEMBER 7, 2018 (DATE OF ISSUE INCORRECTLY STAMPED ON WRIT AS "DEC-7. 2019." AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON LUNA, MIGUEL ANGEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 SERVED NOV-29-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON LUNA, MIGUEL ANGEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALARCON LUNA, MIGUEL ANGEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00, LOAN PRINCIPLE (3607.36) LESS PAYMENTS ON PRINCIPAL (335) =3272.36; COMPLAINT SOUGHT 2500.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALARCON LUNA, MIGUEL ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2018 BY PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL ALARCON LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
